Off Calendar Jun-23-2017 Continued To Oct-17-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim Of Minor - Ladiamond Foreman
Off Calendar Jun-08-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.
Jesse C. Ralph, Esq., appearing for Petitioner: Marcella Jeanne Martin, mother and guardian ad litem for Minors Ladiamond Foreman, Marlena Foreman, and Persephone Foreman, also present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows as to Ladiamond Foreman:
Total Settlement: $11,250.00
Attorney's Fees: $2812.50 payable to Jesse C. Ralph, Esq.
Costs: $0
A net balance of $8,437.50 to be deposited into a blocked account at CityNational Bank, 150 California Street, San Francisco, CA 94111 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on September 7, 2017 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for status of filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodged with Department 514 prior to Hearing.

After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows as to Marlena Foreman:
Total Settlement: $2,500.00
Attorney's Fees: $625.00 payable to Jesse C. Ralph, Esq.
Costs: $0
A net balance of $1,875.00 to be deposited into a blocked account at CityNational Bank, 150 California Street, San Francisco, CA 94111 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on September 7, 2017 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for status of filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodged with Department 514 prior to Hearing.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows as to Persephone Foreman:
Total Settlement: $11,250.00
Attorney's Fees: $2812.50 payable to Jesse C. Ralph, Esq.
Costs: $0
A net balance of $8,437.50 to be deposited into a blocked account at CityNational Bank, 150 California Street, San Francisco, CA 94111 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on September 7, 2017 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for status of filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodged with Department 514 prior to Hearing.
